title: Poor Man's Adventure: Narco Sub Simulator
description:
Drive a boat, see the world. World of the present-future, somewhat ruined.
Mix of few genres that form sort of short adventure game. You get to manage small factories, grow weed, drive a submarine and shoot rich peoples' yachts.
features:
• do dialogue with NPCs

• design automated factories or get your hands dirty

• captain your boat

• use sonar to scan surroundings, hear it ping

• debate capitalism shortcomings with a 50. cal heavy machine gun at your fingertips

• see your foes sink beneath the waves
*smol brain is unadvised
description_short: Join a small community of rejects, try to survive in hospitable world of peak capitalism. As a modern pirate you will scavenge wrecks of rich peoples' yachts for resources, grow weed and manage automated factories.
